data.name: NoFloatConversionConstructingQuantityDescription
data.value: Do not convert float to double when constructing a quantity.

data.name: NoFloatConversionConstructingQuantityMessageFormat
data.value: Do not convert float to double when constructing a quantity in case of incorrect rounding.

data.name: NoFloatConversionConstructingQuantityTitle
data.value: Do not convert float to double when constructing a quantity

data.name: NoImplicitDateTimeOffsetConversionDescription
data.value: Do not convert DateTime to DateTimeOffset implicitly.

data.name: NoImplicitDateTimeOffsetConversionMessageFormat
data.value: Do not convert DateTime to DateTimeOffset implicitly. Use a constructor if it is intended.

data.name: NoImplicitDateTimeOffsetConversionTitle
data.value: Do not convert DateTime to DateTimeOffset implicitly

data.name: NoInliningPublicResourcesDescription
data.value: Apply [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)] to public methods that return resources.

data.name: NoInliningPublicResourcesMessageFormat
data.value: Apply [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)] to {0} to avoid incorrect resources from being loaded.

data.name: NoInliningPublicResourcesTitle
data.value: Disable inlining on public methods that return resources

data.name: SelfReferencingGenericStructStaticFieldDescription
data.value: Do not declare static fields of a generic struct type with a self-referencing type parameter in a struct because the type would not load prior to .NET 10 due to a bug.

data.name: SelfReferencingGenericStructStaticFieldMessageFormat
data.value: Do not declare static fields of a generic struct type with a self-referencing type parameter in a struct because the type would not load prior to .NET 10 due to a bug.

data.name: SelfReferencingGenericStructStaticFieldTitle
data.value: Do not declare static fields of a generic struct type with a self-referencing type parameter in a struct

data.name: SpecifyAccuracyOrderDescription
data.value: Specify AccuracyOrder.

data.name: SpecifyAccuracyOrderMessageFormat
data.value: Specify AccuracyOrder on the property explicitly as a hint about its importance.

data.name: SpecifyAccuracyOrderTitle
data.value: Specify AccuracyOrder

data.name: SpecifyCultureInfoJustification
data.value: Check IFormatProvider instead.

data.name: SpecifyIFormatProviderDescription
data.value: Specify IFormatProvider.

data.name: SpecifyIFormatProviderMessageFormat
data.value: Because the behavior of {0} could vary based on the current user's locale settings, replace this call with a call to {1}.

data.name: SpecifyIFormatProviderTitle
data.value: Specify IFormatProvider

data.name: UseSharedCulturesDescription
data.value: Use SharedCultures to get instances of CultureInfo.

data.name: UseSharedCulturesMessageFormat
data.value: '{0}' can return CultureInfo with bad DateTimeFormat. Use Cryville.EEW.SharedCultures instead.

data.name: UseSharedCulturesTitle
data.value: Use SharedCultures
